name: How do I know which voice search questions to target first?
description: Start with the questions people already ask in calls, intake forms, and search data, then prioritize the highest-intent ones.

mainEntity.name: How do I know which voice search questions to target first?

acceptedAnswer.text: The best proof is the exact language prospects use, plus the pages that already bring in leads. Call transcripts, intake notes, and search data can show which questions deserve a direct answer first.
acceptedAnswer.description: Start with the questions people already ask in calls, intake forms, and search data, then prioritize the highest-intent ones.
